mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_episodes ( episode_code, request_id, conversation_id, user_id_reference, agent_version, original_goal, risk_level, status, next_sequence_no, last_event_hash, event_count, step_count, model_call_count, tool_call_count, token_usage, final_error_code, final_failure_stage, started_at, finished_at, elapsed_ms, sealed, row_version, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{episodeCode}, #{requestId}, #{conversationId}, #{userIdReference}, #{agentVersion}, #{originalGoal}, #{riskLevel}, #{status}, #{nextSequenceNo}, #{lastEventHash}, #{eventCount}, #{stepCount}, #{modelCallCount}, #{toolCallCount}, #{tokenUsage}, #{finalErrorCode}, #{finalFailureStage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{elapsedMs}, #{sealed}, #{rowVersion}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id)
